description.en: Create a scheduled or instant meeting in Zoom.
description.de: Erstelle ein geplantes oder sofortiges Meeting in Zoom.
description.es: Create a scheduled or instant meeting in Zoom.
description.fr: Create a scheduled or instant meeting in Zoom.
description.ro: Create a scheduled or instant meeting in Zoom.
description.it: Create a scheduled or instant meeting in Zoom.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:ZOOM_ACCESS_TOKEN|OAuth access token or JWT token from Zoom App Marketplace.

description.en: Meeting type: 1 = Instant, 2 = Scheduled, 3 = Recurring (no fixed time), 8 = Recurring (fixed time).
description.es: Meeting type: 1 = Instant, 2 = Scheduled, 3 = Recurring (no fixed time), 8 = Recurring (fixed time).
description.fr: Meeting type: 1 = Instant, 2 = Scheduled, 3 = Recurring (no fixed time), 8 = Recurring (fixed time).
description.ro: Meeting type: 1 = Instant, 2 = Scheduled, 3 = Recurring (no fixed time), 8 = Recurring (fixed time).
description.it: Meeting type: 1 = Instant, 2 = Scheduled, 3 = Recurring (no fixed time), 8 = Recurring (fixed time).

description.en: Meeting start time in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss). Required for scheduled meetings.
description.es: Meeting start time in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss). Required for scheduled meetings.
description.fr: Meeting start time in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss). Required for scheduled meetings.
description.ro: Meeting start time in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss). Required for scheduled meetings.
description.it: Meeting start time in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss). Required for scheduled meetings.
